news.title: Celebrating spring 2026 CDIS graduates
news.summary_en: The School of Computer, Data & Information Sciences (CDIS) is proud to celebrate hundreds of spring 2026 graduates who emerge from our academic programs ready to make their mark on the world.  The graduates featured here offer a glimpse of the wide-ranging talents of students across CDIS programs. Each brings their …

news.title: 2025-26 CDIS Undergraduates Honored at Chancellor’s Awards Ceremony
news.summary_en: School of Computer, Data & Information Sciences students were honored at Chancellor’s Undergraduate Awards Ceremony on April 28, 2026.
